testCase.name: Weather Helper Functions: should correctly convert Kelvin to Celsius
Weather Helper Functions: should correctly extract rainfall from object
doINeed.umbrella: should never throw on arbitrary numeric input
doINeed.umbrella: should return true only when rainFall > 0
doINeed.suncream: should never throw on arbitrary weather data
doINeed.jumper: should never throw on arbitrary temperature
doINeed.jumper: should return true when temperature is below 15
doINeed.water: should always return true regardless of input
Resilience: malformed input objects: should handle undefined/null properties gracefully
Weather data processing: should process fetched weather data correctly
Weather data processing: should handle missing rain data gracefully
Weather data processing: should throw an error when API responds with 500
Test the weather kit module's basic functionality: should return true for umbrella test if it is raining
Test the weather kit module's basic functionality: should return true if suncream is required
Test the weather kit module's basic functionality: should return true if jumper is required
Test the weather kit module's basic functionality: should always return true as water is always required
